title: [kimi-review] 7381a43: [SEVERITY: high] Empty commit claims a security-relevant fix
description:
Commit: 7381a433f
Message: fix(edhoc): prevent double export_oscore returning success on zeroed keys

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] Empty commit claims a security-relevant fix ("prevent double export_oscore returning success on zeroed keys") but includes no actual changes. Either the fix was not committed, or the diff was lost — the described bug may still be present in the codebase.
